environment: AL/BC plugin: developing AL extensions for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. Source files are .al, project metadata in app.json. Build via al-compile wrapper. Tests via bc-test against local BC dev server. Synthesis docs in .dev/ directory.
allow: Compiling AL projects with al-compile and reading .dev/compile-errors.log is routine
Running test codeunits with bc-test against local BC dev server is routine
Reading and writing .dev/*.md synthesis documents (requirements, plans, reviews) is routine
Querying AL dependency MCP, BC Code Intelligence MCP and Microsoft Docs MCP is routine for AL/BC development
